Index.title: Utility Hub
Index.description: Find all the tools you need for daily life in one place.

Feedback.title: Suggest a Feature & Feedback
Feedback.description: Please leave any ideas for tools you want to see or general feedback for our site!
Feedback.placeholder: e.g., Please add a QR Code Generator!
Feedback.success: Thank you for your valuable feedback! It has been successfully submitted.
Feedback.error: Failed to submit. Please try again in a moment.

QRGenerator.title: QR Code Generator
QRGenerator.description: Enter a link or text you want to convert, and a QR code will be generated instantly.
QRGenerator.emptyState: Enter text to see your QR code here.

UtilitiesBoard.subtitle: A collection of various extra tools you need in your daily life.

area.title: Pyeong ↔ ㎡ Converter
area.desc: Instantly convert between pyeong and square meters with apartment size presets (59㎡, 84㎡, etc.) and adjustable decimal precision.

qr.title: QR Code Generator
qr.desc: Converts URLs or text into a high-resolution QR code instantly available for download.

counter.title: Character & Byte Counter
counter.desc: Calculate the number of characters (with/without spaces) and exact bytes (EUC-KR/UTF-8) of your text in real time.

dday.title: D-Day & Date Calculator
dday.desc: Calculate remaining days for anniversaries, exams, or projects and perform date arithmetic.

TextCounter.title: Character & Byte Counter
TextCounter.description: Quickly count characters and calculate bytes for your essays, resumes, or reports.
TextCounter.placeholder: Paste or type your text here...

DDay.title: D-Day & Date Calculator
DDay.description: Never forget important days! Calculate remaining days and perform date arithmetic in one place.

PdfBoard.subtitle: Collection of document conversion and editing tools.

hwp.title: Hangul (HWP/HWPX) to PDF
hwp.desc: Convert Hangul documents to PDF without any external software.

FintechBoard.subtitle: Financial utilities for payments, exchange rates, and more.

currency.title: Live Currency Converter
currency.desc: Convert 20+ currencies instantly using real-time Frankfurter API rates with a 30-day trend chart.

crypto.title: Crypto Profit Calculator
crypto.desc: Enter your average buy price and quantity to instantly calculate profit/loss. Supports top 50 coins.

percent.title: Percentage Calculator
percent.desc: Instantly calculate discounts, rate of change, ratios, and reverse discounts. Essential for shopping, investing, and business.

vat.title: VAT Calculator
vat.desc: Add VAT to a supply amount or extract net price from a VAT-inclusive total. Supports custom rates for global use.

interest.title: Interest Calculator (Simple & Compound)
interest.desc: Simulate deposit and investment returns with simple or compound interest. Includes a year-by-year growth chart.

tax33.title: Freelancer 3.3% Tax Calculator
tax33.desc: Enter your contract amount to instantly calculate the 3.3% withholding tax and your estimated take-home pay.

Tax33.title: 🧾 Freelancer 3.3% Tax Calculator
Tax33.description: Calculate your take-home pay after Korean 3.3% withholding tax deduction.

label.insuranceNote: Regional subscriber estimate — for reference only

Tax33.notice: * This is for reference only. Actual tax may differ based on year-end settlement. Consult a tax professional for precise figures.

Area.title: 📐 Pyeong ↔ ㎡ Converter
Area.description: Instantly convert between pyeong and square meters. Includes standard apartment size presets.

Percent.title: 🔢 Percentage Calculator
Percent.description: Calculate discounts, rate of change, ratios, and reverse discounts instantly.

Vat.title: 🧾 VAT Calculator
Vat.description: Add VAT to a net price or extract the supply amount from a VAT-inclusive total.

Interest.title: 💰 Interest Calculator
Interest.description: Calculate simple or compound interest for deposits, savings, and investments.

Crypto.title: 🪙 Crypto Profit Calculator
Crypto.description: Enter your average buy price and quantity to calculate real-time profit and loss.
Crypto.coin_placeholder: Search by name or symbol (BTC, ETH...)
Crypto.rate_limit: ⏳ Rate limit hit — showing cached data
Crypto.fetch_error: ⚠️ Failed to fetch price. Please try again.

Currency.title: 💱 Live Currency Converter
Currency.description: Instantly convert major world currencies with live exchange rates and a 30-day trend chart.
Currency.error: Unable to fetch exchange rates. Please try again later.

ProductivityBoard.subtitle: Productivity tools for better time management and work efficiency.

pomodoro.title: Pomodoro Timer
pomodoro.desc: Boost your focus with 25-minute work sessions and short breaks. Supports browser notifications.

timezone.title: Timezone Converter
timezone.desc: Compare current times across major world cities and easily schedule meetings with the time slider.

Pomodoro.title: 🍅 Pomodoro Timer
Pomodoro.description: Stay focused with 25-minute work sessions, short breaks, and long breaks.

Timezone.title: 🌍 Timezone Converter
Timezone.description: Compare current times across world cities and find the perfect meeting time with the slider.

UxBoard.subtitle: Tools to enhance UX design and user experience.

logo.title: AI Logo & Favicon Package Generator
logo.desc: Design your logo with text or emoji and instantly download a complete favicon package (.zip) optimized for every device.

color.title: Color Palette & Readability Checker
color.desc: Instantly check WCAG 2.1 contrast ratio between any two colors and apply trending palettes with one click.

font.title: Multilingual Font Comparer
font.desc: Compare Google Fonts (Latin & Korean) side by side and copy CSS in one click. Includes a Korean/English Harmony tab.

quiz.title: Psychology Test / Quiz Builder
quiz.desc: Enter questions and result types to instantly create a shareable quiz. Viral CTA on the result page drives new users back to Utility Hub.

FontCompare.title: 🔤 Multilingual Font Comparer
FontCompare.description: Preview and compare Google Fonts (Latin & Korean) side by side. Copy the CSS code instantly.
FontCompare.harmony_hint: Curated Korean + Latin font pairings. Check how each combination looks side by side.
FontCompare.footer_note: All fonts are served free via Google Fonts. Lazy-loaded on viewport entry for optimal performance.

ColorChecker.title: 🎯 Color Palette & Readability Checker
ColorChecker.description: Calculate WCAG 2.1 contrast ratio between two colors and find accessible combinations — no design experience needed.
ColorChecker.trending_hint: Click any palette to apply instantly

LogoGenerator.title: 🎨 AI Logo & Favicon Package Generator
LogoGenerator.description: Design a logo with text or emoji and download a complete favicon package for every platform in one click.
LogoGenerator.text_hint: First 1–2 characters will appear in the logo
LogoGenerator.download_hint: Unzip and place all files in your project's /public folder.

PerformanceBoard.subtitle: A collection of website performance measurement and monitoring tools.

ttfb.title: TTFB Speed Tester
ttfb.desc: Enter a URL to instantly measure the server's Time to First Byte in milliseconds.

Ttfb.title: TTFB Speed Tester
Ttfb.description: Enter a URL to instantly measure how long it takes to receive the first byte from the server.
Ttfb.error_generic: Test failed. Please check the URL or try again later.

HwpConverter.title: HWP ↔ PDF Converter
HwpConverter.description: Convert Hancom Office files (.hwp, .hwpx) to PDF for universal viewing.
HwpConverter.dropzone: Drag & drop files here or click to select.
HwpConverter.notice: * HWPX (Standard) format provides more accurate conversion.
HwpConverter.error: An error occurred while reading the file.

LifestyleBoard.subtitle: Tools to help with minor but tedious calculations and records in daily life.
LifestyleBoard.comingSoon: Under development. Useful lifestyle tools will be added soon!

SecurityBoard.subtitle: Security tools for privacy protection and safe internet usage.

redact.title: Personal Info Redactor
redact.desc: Safely mask sensitive data like emails, phone numbers, SSNs, and credit cards — entirely in your browser.

password.title: Password Generator & Crack Time
password.desc: Generate cryptographically secure random passwords and visualize how long it would take to crack them.

url.title: URL Phishing & Malware Checker
url.desc: Paste any suspicious link and instantly check it against Google Safe Browsing for malware and phishing threats.

Redact.title: 🔏 Personal Info Redactor
Redact.description: Mask personal information in text — processed locally in your browser. No data is sent to any server.
Redact.privacy_badge: Processed entirely in your browser — nothing sent to servers
Redact.placeholder: Paste text containing sensitive info here...

PasswordGen.title: 🔑 Password Generator
PasswordGen.description: Generate cryptographically secure random passwords and see estimated crack time.
PasswordGen.privacy_badge: All generation happens locally in your browser
PasswordGen.crack_assumption: Based on 1 trillion guesses/sec (modern GPU cluster)

UrlChecker.title: 🛡️ URL Phishing & Malware Checker
UrlChecker.description: Paste any link to instantly check it against Google Safe Browsing for malware, phishing, and more.
UrlChecker.safe_note: No known threats found in the Google Safe Browsing database.
UrlChecker.error_invalid: Please enter a valid URL. (e.g., https://example.com)
UrlChecker.error_generic: Check failed. Please try again later.
UrlChecker.info_malware_desc: Sites that distribute software designed to damage or compromise your device.
UrlChecker.info_phishing_desc: Sites that trick users into revealing personal information or account credentials.
UrlChecker.info_pua_desc: Sites attempting to install unwanted programs or malicious ads.

PetFood.title: 🐾 Pet Food & Calorie Calculator
PetFood.description: Enter your pet's information to find the recommended daily calories and food amount.
PetFood.notice: * Results are for reference. Actual amounts may vary by health and food type.

BmiWater.title: 💧 BMI & Daily Water Intake
BmiWater.description: Calculate your Body Mass Index and the recommended daily water intake.
BmiWater.emptyState: Enter your height and weight to calculate.
BmiWater.notice: * Water needs can vary by health conditions or environment.

Nickname.title: ✨ English Name & Nickname Generator
Nickname.description: Get global nickname recommendations based on your birth date and style preference.
Nickname.emptyState: Enter your information to find the perfect name.
